GrantOrContributionPdDurYrGrp.GrantOrContributionPurposeTxt: THE MISSION OF KATALYST EDUCATION IS BASED ON THE PRINCIPLES OF OPEN EDUCATION RESOURCES AND UTILIZING DIGITAL TECHNOLOGY, TO FACILITATE A LEVEL PLAYING FIELD FOR ALL STUDENTS IN POLAND BY DEVELOPING DIGITAL EDUCATION TOOLS AND PROVIDING SERVICES AND SOLUTIONS TO ENABLE OPTIMAL USE OF SUCH TOOLS.

THE MISSION OF KATALYST EDUCATION IS BASED ON THE PRINCIPLES OF OPEN EDUCATION RESOURCES AND UTILIZING DIGITAL TECHNOLOGY, TO FACILITATE A LEVEL PLAYING FIELD FOR ALL STUDENTS IN POLAND BY DEVELOPING DIGITAL EDUCATION TOOLS AND PROVIDING SERVICES AND SOLUTIONS TO ENABLE OPTIMAL USE OF SUCH TOOLS.

THE MISSION OF KATALYST EDUCATION IS BASED ON THE PRINCIPLES OF OPEN EDUCATION RESOURCES AND UTILIZING DIGITAL TECHNOLOGY, TO FACILITATE A LEVEL PLAYING FIELD FOR ALL STUDENTS IN POLAND BY DEVELOPING DIGITAL EDUCATION TOOLS AND PROVIDING SERVICES AND SOLUTIONS TO ENABLE OPTIMAL USE OF SUCH TOOLS.

THE MISSION OF KATALYST EDUCATION IS BASED ON THE PRINCIPLES OF OPEN EDUCATION RESOURCES AND UTILIZING DIGITAL TECHNOLOGY, TO FACILITATE A LEVEL PLAYING FIELD FOR ALL STUDENTS IN POLAND BY DEVELOPING DIGITAL EDUCATION TOOLS AND PROVIDING SERVICES AND SOLUTIONS TO ENABLE OPTIMAL USE OF SUCH TOOLS.

THE MISSION OF KATALYST EDUCATION IS BASED ON THE PRINCIPLES OF OPEN EDUCATION RESOURCES AND UTILIZING DIGITAL TECHNOLOGY, TO FACILITATE A LEVEL PLAYING FIELD FOR ALL STUDENTS IN POLAND BY DEVELOPING DIGITAL EDUCATION TOOLS AND PROVIDING SERVICES AND SOLUTIONS TO ENABLE OPTIMAL USE OF SUCH TOOLS.

THE MISSION OF KATALYST EDUCATION IS BASED ON THE PRINCIPLES OF OPEN EDUCATION RESOURCES AND UTILIZING DIGITAL TECHNOLOGY, TO FACILITATE A LEVEL PLAYING FIELD FOR ALL STUDENTS IN POLAND BY DEVELOPING DIGITAL EDUCATION TOOLS AND PROVIDING SERVICES AND SOLUTIONS TO ENABLE OPTIMAL USE OF SUCH TOOLS.

THE MISSION OF KATALYST EDUCATION IS BASED ON THE PRINCIPLES OF OPEN EDUCATION RESOURCES AND UTILIZING DIGITAL TECHNOLOGY, TO FACILITATE A LEVEL PLAYING FIELD FOR ALL STUDENTS IN POLAND BY DEVELOPING DIGITAL EDUCATION TOOLS AND PROVIDING SERVICES AND SOLUTIONS TO ENABLE OPTIMAL USE OF SUCH TOOLS.

TO IMPLEMENT "GOTTA GET ENGINEERING" PROGRAM FOR K12 SCHOOLS WHICH IMPLEMENTS 3D PRINTERS, 3D SCANNERS AND HANDS-ON SCIENCE KITS TO INTEGRATE ENGINEERING DESIGN AND 3D PRINTING TECHNOLOGY WITH CORE ACADEMIC KNOWLEDGE IN SCIENCE, MATH, BIOLOGY, AND ART, WITH THE AIM TO STIMULATE THE DEVELOPMENT OF IMPORTANT SKILLS SUCH AS PROBLEM SOLVING, COLLABORATION, COMMUNICATION, CLEAR AND CRITICAL THINKING WHILE DEVELOPING CORE ACADEMIC KNOWLEDGE.

TO IMPLEMENT "GOTTA GET ENGINEERING" PROGRAM FOR K12 SCHOOLS WHICH IMPLEMENTS 3D PRINTERS, 3D SCANNERS AND HANDS-ON SCIENCE KITS TO INTEGRATE ENGINEERING DESIGN AND 3D PRINTING TECHNOLOGY WITH CORE ACADEMIC KNOWLEDGE IN SCIENCE, MATH, BIOLOGY, AND ART, WITH THE AIM TO STIMULATE THE DEVELOPMENT OF IMPORTANT SKILLS SUCH AS PROBLEM SOLVING, COLLABORATION, COMMUNICATION, CLEAR AND CRITICAL THINKING WHILE DEVELOPING CORE ACADEMIC KNOWLEDGE.

TO IMPLEMENT "GOTTA GET ENGINEERING" PROGRAM FOR K12 SCHOOLS WHICH IMPLEMENTS 3D PRINTERS, 3D SCANNERS AND HANDS-ON SCIENCE KITS TO INTEGRATE ENGINEERING DESIGN AND 3D PRINTING TECHNOLOGY WITH CORE ACADEMIC KNOWLEDGE IN SCIENCE, MATH, BIOLOGY, AND ART, WITH THE AIM TO STIMULATE THE DEVELOPMENT OF IMPORTANT SKILLS SUCH AS PROBLEM SOLVING, COLLABORATION, COMMUNICATION, CLEAR AND CRITICAL THINKING WHILE DEVELOPING CORE ACADEMIC KNOWLEDGE.

TO IMPLEMENT "GOTTA GET ENGINEERING" PROGRAM FOR K12 SCHOOLS WHICH IMPLEMENTS 3D PRINTERS, 3D SCANNERS AND HANDS-ON SCIENCE KITS TO INTEGRATE ENGINEERING DESIGN AND 3D PRINTING TECHNOLOGY WITH CORE ACADEMIC KNOWLEDGE IN SCIENCE, MATH, BIOLOGY, AND ART, WITH THE AIM TO STIMULATE THE DEVELOPMENT OF IMPORTANT SKILLS SUCH AS PROBLEM SOLVING, COLLABORATION, COMMUNICATION, CLEAR AND CRITICAL THINKING WHILE DEVELOPING CORE ACADEMIC KNOWLEDGE.

TO CREATE THE BRIAN PATTERSON LOAN FORGIVENESS FUND. THE FUND WILL BE USED TO PROMOTE EMPLOYMENT IN NONPROFIT OR PUBLIC SECTOR SERVICE, OR BY SOCIAL IMPACT-FOCUSED ORGANIZATIONS AND BUSINESSES. PAYOUTS FROM THE FUND ARE TO BE AWARDED TO SELECTED GRADUATE APPLICANTS IN ORDER TO COVER A PERCENTAGE OF THEIR STUDENT LOAN OBLIGATIONS THAT WERE INCURRED AT STANFORD'S GRADUATE SCHOOL OF BUSINESS.

THE MISSION OF OPENSTAX POLAND IS, BASED ON THE PRINCIPLES OF OPEN EDUCATIONAL RESOURCES, TO FACILITATE A LEVEL PLAYING FIELD FOR ALL STUDENTS IN POLAND BY DEVELOPING DIGITAL EDUCATIONAL TOOLS AND PROVIDING SERVICES TO ENABLE THEIR OPTIMAL USE.
TO FACILITATE BUILDING OF RICE STUDENT ATHLETE CENTER AND SUPPORT PROGRAMS IN THE JONES SCHOOL OF BUSINESS AND BROWN SCHOOL OF ENGINEERING.
TO FACILITATE BUILDING OF RICE STUDENT ATHLETE CENTER AND SUPPORT PROGRAMS IN THE JONES SCHOOL OF BUSINESS AND BROWN SCHOOL OF ENGINEERING.
TO FACILITATE BUILDING OF RICE STUDENT ATHLETE CENTER AND SUPPORT PROGRAMS IN THE JONES SCHOOL OF BUSINESS AND BROWN SCHOOL OF ENGINEERING.

TO INSPIRE, GROW AND NURTURE FOUNDATIONS THAT HELP LEVEL THE PLAYING FIELD FOR CHILDREN FACING ADVERSITY BY PROVIDING INCREASED ACCESS TO THE SAME RESOURCES AS THEIR MORE ADVANTAGED PEERS IN ORDER TO ENHANCE THEIR LEARNING, HEALTH, FUTURE OPPORTUNITIES AND OVER-ALL WELL-BEING.

TO INSPIRE, GROW AND NURTURE FOUNDATIONS THAT HELP LEVEL THE PLAYING FIELD FOR CHILDREN FACING ADVERSITY BY PROVIDING INCREASED ACCESS TO THE SAME RESOURCES AS THEIR MORE ADVANTAGED PEERS IN ORDER TO ENHANCE THEIR LEARNING, HEALTH, FUTURE OPPORTUNITIES AND OVER-ALL WELL-BEING.

TO INSPIRE, GROW AND NURTURE FOUNDATIONS THAT HELP LEVEL THE PLAYING FIELD FOR CHILDREN FACING ADVERSITY BY PROVIDING INCREASED ACCESS TO THE SAME RESOURCES AS THEIR MORE ADVANTAGED PEERS IN ORDER TO ENHANCE THEIR LEARNING, HEALTH, FUTURE OPPORTUNITIES AND OVER-ALL WELL-BEING.

TO INSPIRE, GROW AND NURTURE FOUNDATIONS THAT HELP LEVEL THE PLAYING FIELD FOR CHILDREN FACING ADVERSITY BY PROVIDING INCREASED ACCESS TO THE SAME RESOURCES AS THEIR MORE ADVANTAGED PEERS IN ORDER TO ENHANCE THEIR LEARNING, HEALTH, FUTURE OPPORTUNITIES AND OVER-ALL WELL-BEING.

GrantOrContriApprvForFutGrp.GrantOrContributionPurposeTxt: TO CREATE THE BRIAN PATTERSON LOAN FORGIVENESS FUND. THE FUND WILL BE USED TO PROMOTE EMPLOYMENT IN NONPROFIT OR PUBLIC SECTOR SERVICE, OR BY SOCIAL IMPACT-FOCUSED ORGANIZATIONS AND BUSINESSES. PAYOUTS FROM THE FUND ARE TO BE AWARDED TO SELECTED GRADUATE APPLICANTS IN ORDER TO COVER A PERCENTAGE OF THEIR STUDENT LOAN OBLIGATIONS THAT WERE INCURRED AT STANFORD'S GRADUATE SCHOOL OF BUSINESS.
